HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Comma-separated list of hosts allowed to serve Homepage (required by Homepage v1.0+). Railway serves from a dynamic *.railway.app domain, so '*' disables the host check. For tighter security set this to your actual domain(s), e.g. mydash.railway.app.

HOMEPAGE_VAR_DEFAULT_THEME.description: Default theme: dark, light, neon, or glassmorphism. Applied only if your config YAML references the {{HOMEPAGE_VAR_DEFAULT_THEME}} placeholder.

HOMEPAGE_VAR_TITLE.description: Custom dashboard title (e.g., My Dashboard). Leave empty for default. Applied only if config YAML uses {{HOMEPAGE_VAR_TITLE}}.

HOMEPAGE_VAR_LANGUAGE.description: Dashboard language code (e.g., en, fr, de). Leave empty for browser default. Applied only if config YAML uses {{HOMEPAGE_VAR_LANGUAGE}}.
